project_type: MQL5 Expert Advisor (MetaTrader 5 native trading algorithm)
build_system: MetaEditor (MT5 IDE) - files are .mq5 source, no build tooling in repo
test_framework: None - MQL5 backtested in MT5 Strategy Tester, not unit-testable in sandbox
build_command: N/A - MQL5 compiles in MetaEditor, not available in sandbox
test_command: N/A - syntax validation only possible via grep/AST checks
verification_instructions: Verify each .mq5 file: 1) Has proper MQL5 header/properties, 2) All functions/structs are syntactically valid C-like code, 3) No undefined references between parts, 4) Consistent naming conventions, 5) All include references point to correct files
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure source code output
environment_constraints: No MQL5 compiler available in sandbox. Validation is structural/syntactic only. Files must be valid MQL5 that would compile in MetaEditor.
contribution_requirements: Save each part as a separate .mq5 file in the repo root. Files should be numbered and named descriptively.
key_patterns: Symphony base patterns to preserve: Phase engine (4-phase curvature-based state machine), ARC v2 convexity exit, entry logic (Phase 3 + Phase 4 for long/short), stop loss placement (anchor +/- 0.25 ATR), impulse detection, inducement/flipzone logic. From F16/Letra to add: Multi-timeframe structure engine (f_se on M1/M3/M5/M15/H1/H4), Engine 1A unified lifecycle (14 canonical phases), Energy Resolution Framework (EDE/RE/EAE), Belief Engine (6 simultaneous beliefs), Senseei meta-intelligence (alignment/contradiction/threat/confidence/timing/intent/opportunity/action), Curve Object/Tree (recursive ownership), Time Intelligence Engine, Campaign Ownership, MTF Curve Map, dashboard panels.
relevant_files: symphony.txt - MQL5 base (entry/stop/phase engine/ARC exit/lot sizing/order execution)
F16 V70.txt - PineScript indicator (Invisible Network, Senseei, Curve Tree, Time Intelligence, Campaign, MTF)
LETRA 37.txt - PineScript indicator (f_se structure engine, Engine 1A lifecycle, ERF, Beliefs, FRZ, V72 Decision Architecture)
directory_structure: Flat repository with source documents and output .mq5 files at root level
